sequence_title: Was Marx Right? Evaluating Marxist Political Economy (Self‑Study Sequence)

timeline.facilitator_actions: Learner accesses Material A1-TEXT-1 - Historical Materialism as a Method, then studies Material A1-WE-1 - Worked Example: Applying Historical Materialism to Capitalism and Material A1-SO-1 - Annotated Sample Explanation.
timeline.learner_actions: Read Material A1-TEXT-1, work through the reasoning in Material A1-WE-1, compare with Material A1-SO-1, and produce a short explanation checked against Material A1-CHK-1.
timeline.transition_to_next: Move from conceptual explanation to analysing how profit and exploitation are explained in capitalism.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Learner uses Material A2-TEXT-1 - Surplus Value, Profit, and Exploitation, followed by Material A2-WE-1 - Worked Example: Identifying Surplus Value.
timeline.learner_actions: Complete Material A2-AT-1 - Surplus Value Analysis Table, then write a short explanation and verify it using Material A2-CHK-1.
timeline.transition_to_next: Shift from static concepts to dynamic analysis of capitalism over time.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Learner studies Material A3-WE-1 - Worked Analysis: From Accumulation to Crisis and reviews Material A3-SCN-1 - Capitalist Development Scenarios.
timeline.learner_actions: Analyse both scenarios using Material A3-AT-1 - Accumulation and Crisis Analysis Table and self-check reasoning with Material A3-CHK-1.
timeline.transition_to_next: Move from analysing mechanisms to evaluating Marx’s historical claims.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Learner reviews Material A4-CRIT-1 - Historical Evaluation Criteria and reads Material A4-SCN-1 - Historical Capitalist Trajectories.
timeline.learner_actions: Complete Material A4-DT-1 - Historical Evaluation Decision Table, write an evaluative judgement, verify using Material A4-CHK-1, and respond to Material A4-TP-1.
timeline.transition_to_next: Integrate historical evaluation into a contemporary judgement.

timeline.facilitator_actions: Learner revisits criteria using Material A5-CRIT-1 - Contemporary Evaluation Criteria.
timeline.learner_actions: Complete the independent judgement using Material A5-TPL-1, verify with Material A5-CHK-1, write the consolidation using Material A5-CS-1, and complete transfer using Material A5-TP-1.
timeline.transition_to_next: Session ends with consolidation and transfer completed.
